golden_categories.name: Standard FQDN Validation
golden_categories.description: Validates fully qualified domain names (FQDN) with default options.

golden_categories.name: Trailing Dot Option
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with the option to allow a trailing dot.

golden_categories.name: No TLD Requirement
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs without requiring a top-level domain (TLD).

golden_categories.name: Numeric TLDs Without Requirement
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with numeric TLDs when TLD requirement is disabled.

golden_categories.name: Wildcard Option
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with the option to allow wildcard domains.

golden_categories.name: Combined Options
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with multiple options enabled: trailing dot, underscores, and numeric TLDs.

generated_categories.name: Default Validation Behavior
generated_categories.description: Tests the default behavior of the isFQDN validator with no options specified.

generated_categories.name: TLD Requirement Options
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when the requirement for a top-level domain (TLD) is toggled.

generated_categories.name: Underscore Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when underscores are allowed in domain names.

generated_categories.name: Trailing Dot Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when trailing dots are allowed in domain names.

generated_categories.name: Numeric TLD Support
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when numeric TLDs are allowed.

generated_categories.name: Wildcard Domain Support
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when wildcard domains starting with '*.' are allowed.

generated_categories.name: Maximum Length Constraint
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior of the isFQDN validator when the maximum length constraint for domains is ignored.

golden_to_generated.reason: Both categories focus on the default behavior of FQDN validation without any additional options.
Both categories address the validation of FQDNs with the trailing dot option enabled.
GENC-2 covers toggling the TLD requirement, but GC-3 specifically focuses on disabling the TLD requirement.
Both categories address the validation of FQDNs with numeric TLDs when the TLD requirement is disabled.
Both categories focus on the validation of FQDNs with wildcard domains allowed.
No generated category combines multiple options such as trailing dots, underscores, and numeric TLDs.

generated_to_golden.reason: Both categories focus on the default behavior of FQDN validation without any additional options.
GENC-2 covers toggling the TLD requirement, but GC-3 specifically focuses on disabling the TLD requirement.
No golden category addresses the handling of underscores in FQDN validation.
Both categories address the validation of FQDNs with the trailing dot option enabled.
Both categories address the validation of FQDNs with numeric TLDs when the TLD requirement is disabled.
Both categories focus on the validation of FQDNs with wildcard domains allowed.
No golden category addresses the maximum length constraint for FQDN validation.

novel_generated_categories.reason: This category introduces underscore handling, which is not covered by any golden category.
This category introduces the concept of ignoring the maximum length constraint, which is not covered by any golden category.

missing_golden_categories.reason: No generated categories achieved strong or partial semantic overlap with this fixed golden category.
